name: teamwork-skill
description: Claude Code adapter skills for research, local evidence, design, debugging, planning, review, setup, updates, and long-running goals; routine local work stays native.

interface.shortDescription: Ten focused collaboration skills for research, local evidence, design, debugging, review, setup, updates, and goals.
interface.longDescription: Teamwork adds ten focused collaboration skills for cited external research, read-only local evidence, decision design, unknown-cause debugging, executable planning, read-only review, explicit question-led challenge, project initialization, global refresh, and long-running convergence. Routine local inspection and authorized implementation stay with Claude Code's native workflow; no router or execution skill is required. You choose the scope and authorize changes; Claude Code remains in control of tools and permissions.
defaultPrompt: Use $teamwork-research to investigate this current external question from primary sources with linked citations.
Use $teamwork-design to inspect context, explore options, ask bounded decision batches, and produce a decision-ready design.
Implement this scoped change with native Claude Code behavior and verify the changed path.
